final:
module RefModule (
        input e,
        input f,
        input g,
  wire temp1_( ~e & ~f & g ) |
           ( ~e & f & ~g ) |
           ( e & ~f & ~g ) |
           ( e & ~f & g ) = ( ~e & ~f & g ) |
           ( ~e & f & ~g ) |
           ( e & ~f & ~g ) |
           ( e & ~f & g );
  wire temp2_( e & f & g ) = ( e & f & g );
  assign h = temp1_( ~e & ~f & g ) |
           ( ~e & f & ~g ) |
           ( e & ~f & ~g ) |
           ( e & ~f & g ) | temp2_( e & f & g );

endmodule
